blocks.content: Ikael, why…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ikael, why…
Shirone looked at Ikael with sorrowful eyes.
Her face, frowning, was completely different from the kind impression he remembered.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: What was she hiding?

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: No, why had she changed?
The image of her standing on the side of humans after meeting Goffin had disappeared, replaced by the majesty of an archangel controlling humans with powerful authority.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: If they had been even a little late, the rebel's first command would have exploded.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: Countless lives would have been lost.
More frightening than hitting her was the fact that someone could die by her hand.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Stop this now. You said you came to make a peace agreement, but now you're changing your words like flipping a hand?

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: Shirone, there is no eternal peace. I only came to propose a truce. But human indulgence has reached the heavens, so I am destroying them by the law.
Anke Ra wants to hear the answer to the question of the one who disappeared.
The truce is only for that purpose.
Ra's will, which craves an answer even while prohibiting the activities of angels, was deeply conveyed to Ikael, but she couldn't just leave the arrogant humans alone.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: The negotiations are broken. I will destroy the rebels here and establish Heaven's authority.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Do you think it will be that easy?
Gaold's party approached from behind Shirone.
Around them, hundreds of rebels, ready for battle, were mounted on Kuroi.
The sound of Titan engines could be heard in the distance.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: From Ikael's perspective, it was laughable.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: No human could harm an archangel. The very status of the law was different.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: If possible, it would be a law beyond the law. Something that transcends humans.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: 'Like that person…'
Ikael shook her head firmly.
She would think no more.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: Prepare. They're coming.
A thick fighting spirit rose from Ikael's body.
Even without Ataraxia, the powerful aura made the mountains and rivers tremble, and Shirone's party tensed up.
Gaold glared at Ikael with unprecedented sharpness.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: The power of the archangel he faced was indeed formidable.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: But he couldn't lose.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Even if he couldn't win, he had a reason why he absolutely couldn't lose.
Rumble, rumble, rumble!
The ground where Ikael stood began to crack in a circle as it was pressed down.
Her body was ready to burst out with terrifying explosive power.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: Before humans could perceive it, she could reach the entire rebel command.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: In other words, the first target would surely die.
Even Cage Team B, who had intended not to get involved in this incident, had to take a defensive stance from a distance.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: 'The first target to eliminate is…'
Ikael's eyes flashed as she sprang forward.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: Shirone.'

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: Although Ra had prohibited the activities of angels, archangels born from the original concept were not bound by Ra's law.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: Therefore, they were likely already observing the situation here in real-time through 'overlooking.'
Ikael captured the gradually approaching figure of Shirone in her eyes.
The speed was so fast that all the scenery, including Shirone, seemed to freeze in time.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: 'If I don't show my will, the authority of the archangel will be shaken.'

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: She had already shown too many ridiculous sides.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: If she wavered any more, the archangels would act independently of Ikael's authority, creating a significant obstacle to fulfilling Ra's will.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: 'Therefore…'
She would eliminate Shirone.
At the point of this thought, her body had already closed half the distance to Shirone.
Then the scenery began to move slowly.
Babel and Gaold leaned in almost simultaneously, followed by Sein, Zulu, and Armin.
Next, Kangnan, then Etella, Siena, and Kuan took counterattack stances.
Finally, even Plu, performing automatic actions through the Dawkins algorithm, did not move.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: In the state of Vajra Armor, cognitive abilities increase tremendously.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: Therefore, the immobility was entirely his choice.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: Thinking quickly can be unfortunate in some ways.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: You see things you shouldn't see and think things you shouldn't think.
Ikael gritted her teeth and raised her claws at Shirone.
She would rip out his heart.
Dodging Babel's strike, she extended her five fingers towards Shirone's heart.
The wind, pushed from tens of meters away, hit Shirone, blowing his robe back.
At the same time, Ikael's hand stopped abruptly.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'Why…'

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: Are you crying?
Tears were flowing from his incredibly lovely eyes.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: It was a stronger restraint than the authority of the archangel or even Anke Ra.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: How much had she given to this boy?
As everyone froze in their counterattack attempts, Shirone spoke in a trembling voice.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I just wanted to hold you like before… just once…
At Shirone's voice, Ikael's halo began to shake violently.
The memory was erased. But the memory of the erasure was not erased.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: The small, perhaps even thinner than a particle, edge of the erasure was stained with emotions deeper than the universe.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: She truly lost her memory, but she realized that it was a memory she should never have lost.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: Whatever it was, she had to accept that it was incredibly precious.
Ikael slowly lowered her hand.
She couldn't hug Shirone, but she couldn't hurt him either.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: 'I just have to accept it.'
Ikael slowly stepped back.
With each step she took back, the tension weighing on everyone's shoulders seemed to lighten by several tons.
When Ikael returned to her original position, a colorful panel shone in front of her, and the three-horned Mara appeared.
Only a few of Gaold's party knew that Ashur was Heaven's greatest swordmaster.

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: Lady Ikael.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: Speak.
Ikael still kept her gaze on Shirone.
The reason for her indifferent tone was that she already had an idea.

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: It's a rebellion. Kariel has summoned the fire giants to the Second Heaven, and Uriel has joined him. The remaining archangels have scattered across Heaven with different purposes.
They had realized it too.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: Although Ikael had regained her original power, she had a fatal flaw that was different from before.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: If she couldn't lead everyone with her powerful strength, the archangels would act according to their own judgments.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: Of course, only Kariel and Uriel would deviate enough to reject Anke Ra's message after prohibiting angelic activities.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: But at least the three Maras under the other archangels were free.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: 'Heaven is indeed in a period of upheaval. But this is also my burden to bear.'

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: What about the lower angels?

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: They haven't left the temples. As long as they are bound by the higher law of the archangels, they won't do anything foolish.
It wasn't something he could guarantee.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: If another archangel caused another rebellion, it would affect the lower angels as well.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: Let's go back. The negotiations are broken.
Ashur, nodding, looked back at Shirone with a troubled expression.

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: The sins Ikael committed were erased when she was reinstated, but only Ikael had lost her memory.

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: Therefore, Ashur had some idea about the relationship between Ikael and Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: But it was extremely abnormal and dangerous.

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: To perfectly reinstate Ikael, it would have been best to reset her.

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: Erasing the incident itself would prevent any variables.

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: But Ra didn't do that.

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: Or couldn't he?

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: Could that be the case?

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: Even the Ultima system couldn't stop Ra's reset.

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: Therefore, the fact that he couldn't do it meant that a situational constraint beyond Ra's ability was at play.

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: In other words, Ra is currently unable to attempt a reset.
An electric signal, signifying a shiver, ran through Ashur's body.

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: Damn it! That's right. The timeline we're in now…

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: They had struck before the underlying event was completed.

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: Therefore, the war between Heaven and the rebels was only a visible situation, with a high-level psychological war unfolding behind the scenes.

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: Perhaps someone, a group, an organization, or something larger on the human side.

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: That's why Ymir isn't moving. It's completely tangled.

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: If they were trying to create a variable first, the event they were experiencing now was the first event outside the reset.

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: In other words, it was a raw timeline flowing.

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: Even the supreme spiritual beings, the angels, couldn't predict the variables of time flowing beyond causality.

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: Anke Ra wasn't suppressing the war but rather fighting alone.

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: Against someone controlling the timeline from the human side.

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: Then I must keep my mouth shut too.

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: Not knowing how today's small variable would affect Heaven, he had no choice but to follow Ra's judgment.

blocks.speaker: Ashur
blocks.content: Embracing the frustration of not being able to predict even the near future, Ashur signaled Ikael to return.
As Ikael was about to fly up, Gaold asked.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Where is Miro?

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: She is in the Second Heaven.
Ikael revealed it without hesitation.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: She also vaguely sensed what Ashur was thinking.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: To lead the seven archangels, it was best to bind the most dangerous elements, Kariel and Uriel, to some extent.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: I see. We'll go find her.
Ikael didn't respond and flew up like light, disappearing from everyone's sight in the command center.
The atmosphere in the rebel command was solemn.
They couldn't blame anyone else for ruining the unprecedented proposal from Heaven.
The officers couldn't decide on the war and held heated discussions all night, while Gaold's party was deep in thought, each contemplating their own ideas.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'Ikael…'

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Why had she treated him so coldly?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If it was just a misunderstanding, he could accept that.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But in the end, she couldn't attack him.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: In that hesitant tremor, there was the message Shirone had truly wanted to hear.
There was a knock, and Sein entered, prompting Shirone to force a smile.

blocks.speaker: Sein
blocks.content: How are you feeling?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It doesn't feel real.
It was strange for a savant like him to care about emotions, but it didn't feel bad.

blocks.speaker: Sein
blocks.content: I won't ask about your relationship with Ikael.
Sein was sincere.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I understand. Since I've fulfilled the contract conditions, I won't hesitate. Please plan the operation to activate divine punishment.
Sein nodded.

blocks.speaker: Sein
blocks.content: That was the most important issue for now.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If there was something about Ikael that differed from your expectations…

blocks.speaker: Sein
blocks.content: It might be due to Anke Ra's Akashic Record.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Are you saying Ikael lost her memory?

blocks.speaker: Sein
blocks.content: That's a possibility. When a part changes, the whole changes. Anke Ra is the whole, so it doesn't matter how it changes, but we intend to use the variables that come from it. Ikael is also within that range of variables.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The war wasn't over yet.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You will carry out an independent mission. It would be best if Zulu supported you, but we have some concerns on our side. Plu will accompany you.
Shirone was pleased.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes, I'm very happy with that.

blocks.speaker: Sein
blocks.content: Rest. We'll inform you once the plan is set.
Sein finished his brief business and turned to leave.
As he was about to exit, Shirone spoke.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Thank you.
Sein closed the door, pondering his final words.

blocks.speaker: Sein
blocks.content: …It's just part of the strategy.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That might be true, but Shirone felt much lighter than before.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'Ikael.'

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He would meet her again.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That was the only reason he had come to Heaven.
